tasks.subject: Task 0: studio-config.js + studio-supabase.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the shared Supabase client and all CRUD operations used by every page.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/studio-config.js`
- Create: `studio/studio-supabase.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] supabase client initialises without error
- [ ] listMariages() returns array
- [ ] saveMariage() inserts and returns id
- [ ] deleteMariage() removes row
- [ ] duplicateMariage() creates copy
- [ ] uploadPhoto() returns public URL

**Verify:** browser console: `listMariages().then(console.log)`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/studio-config.js", "studio/studio-supabase.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser console: listMariages().then(console.log)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["listMariages() returns array", "saveMariage() inserts and returns id", "deleteMariage() removes row", "duplicateMariage() creates copy", "uploadPhoto() returns public URL"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: style.css — Shared styles additions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend existing dark-theme CSS for table, tabs, loading/empty/error states, confirm modal, upload slots.

**Files:**
- Modify: `studio/style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .clients-table renders
- [ ] .tabs and .tab-content show/hide via .active
- [ ] .state-loading/.state-empty/.state-error display correctly
- [ ] .modal-confirm overlays
- [ ] .save-feedback toast appears
- [ ] .upload-slot renders

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "visual check in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table renders", "tabs work", "states display", "modal overlays", "toast appears"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: clients.html + clients.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Page listing all marriages from Supabase with Edit/Preview/Duplicate/Delete actions.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/clients.html`
- Create: `studio/clients.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] spinner on load
- [ ] table renders rows
- [ ] edit navigates to studio.html?id=
- [ ] preview sets sessionStorage and navigates
- [ ] duplicate reloads list
- [ ] delete shows confirm then removes
- [ ] empty state when no data

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/clients.html", "studio/clients.js"], "verifyCommand": "open studio/clients.html in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spinner shows on load", "table renders rows", "edit navigates", "preview sets sessionStorage", "duplicate reloads", "delete confirms then removes", "empty state works"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: studio.html + studio.js — Shell + Onglet Infos
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Editor page shell with topbar, 5-tab nav, Infos tab, load from Supabase, manual save.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/studio.html`
- Create: `studio/studio.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 5 tabs switch correctly
- [ ] Infos fields populate from Supabase when ?id= given
- [ ] Sauvegarder triggers UPSERT + green toast
- [ ] ← Clients navigates back
- [ ] Prévisualiser sets sessionStorage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/studio.html", "studio/studio.js"], "verifyCommand": "open studio/studio.html in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 tabs switch", "Infos populates from Supabase", "save triggers UPSERT + toast", "clients nav works", "preview sets sessionStorage"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: studio.js — Onglet Contenu
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire Contenu tab with 6 dynamic lists (histoire, programme, lieux, galerie domaine, FAQ, infos pratiques).

**Files:**
- Modify: `studio/studio.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 6 list sections render
- [ ] + Ajouter adds item block
- [ ] × removes item block
- [ ] readContenu reads all items
- [ ] populateContenu fills from saved config
- [ ] round-trip save/reload preserves items

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/studio.js"], "verifyCommand": "open studio/studio.html → click Contenu tab", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 list sections render", "+ Ajouter adds block", "× removes block", "round-trip preserves items"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: studio.js — Onglets Médias + Thème + Template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete editor with photo upload slots (Médias), color/font editor (Thème), template selector (Template).

**Files:**
- Modify: `studio/studio.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] upload slot accepts file and URL
- [ ] file upload calls uploadPhoto()
- [ ] color pickers sync with hex inputs
- [ ] Générer palette fills 11 colors
- [ ] 3 template radios selectable
- [ ] round-trip restores all values

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/studio.js"], "verifyCommand": "open studio/studio.html → test Médias, Thème, Template tabs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upload accepts file + URL", "uploadPhoto() called on file drop", "palette generation works", "3 radios selectable", "round-trip save/reload works"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: preview.html + preview.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full-screen preview page reading sessionStorage, fetching template assets, displaying in iframe.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/preview.html`
- Create: `studio/preview.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] correct template loaded by row.template
- [ ] iframe displays site
- [ ] topbar shows couple + template name
- [ ] open in new tab works
- [ ] empty session shows fallback

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/preview.html", "studio/preview.js"], "verifyCommand": "open preview.html after setting sessionStorage.wedoria_current", "acceptanceCriteria": ["correct template path used", "iframe displays site", "topbar correct", "new tab works", "empty session fallback"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Intégration end-to-end + validation utilisateur
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify full flow works and get user confirmation of all 6 spec success criteria.

**Files:** No code changes (fix in place if issues found).

**User Verification Required:**
Before marking this task complete, you MUST call AskUserQuestion:
```yaml
AskUserQuestion:
  question: "Avez-vous pu tester le flux complet (créer → éditer → sauvegarder → prévisualiser) ? Tous les critères de succès sont-ils remplis ?"
  header: "Validation Sprint 2"
  options:
    - label: "Oui — tout fonctionne"
      description: "Sprint validé, on peut supprimer index.html + script.js"
    - label: "Problème(s) détecté(s)"
      description: "Décrire ce qui ne marche pas pour corriger"
```

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual flow test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create from scratch works", "all tabs editable", "3 templates previewable", "photo upload + URL works", "Supabase persists", "preview matches site"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "Avez-vous pu tester le flux complet ? Tous les critères de succès sont-ils remplis ?"}
```
